title: Bihać, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bihać, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bihać is a city in Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina with a population of 56,000. A city in northwestern Bosnia on the Una River, known for the stunning Una National Park waterfalls and its historic old town.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
